lessons.title: What are Props?
lessons.description: Pass data from parent to child components using props.

lessons.title: State with useState
lessons.description: Make your components dynamic with the useState hook.

lessons.title: Handling Events
lessons.description: Respond to user input like text changes and button presses.

lessons.title: Updating State Based on Previous State
lessons.description: Safely update state when the new value depends on the old one.

lessons.title: Lifting State Up
lessons.description: Share state between components by moving it to a common ancestor.
